preset.name: Preset filter
preset.description: Only match when this specific preset is active. Leave empty to match any preset.

user.title: Set up Aqara Advanced Lighting
user.description: Configure advanced lighting control for Aqara lights via Zigbee2MQTT.

data_description.z2m_base_topic: The MQTT base topic for your Zigbee2MQTT instance. Usually 'zigbee2mqtt' unless you changed it.
The MQTT base topic for your Zigbee2MQTT instance.

error.mqtt_not_loaded: MQTT integration is not loaded. Please set up the MQTT integration first.
error.duplicate_base_topic: An instance with this Zigbee2MQTT base topic already exists.
error.z2m_not_found: No Zigbee2MQTT instance found at this base topic. Please verify the topic is correct and that Zigbee2MQTT is running.

abort.already_configured: An instance with this Zigbee2MQTT base topic is already configured.

integration_not_initialized.message: The Aqara Advanced Lighting integration is not initialized. Please check that the integration is properly configured.

components_not_initialized.message: Integration components are not initialized. Please reload the integration or restart Home Assistant.

cct_manager_not_initialized.message: The CCT sequence manager is not initialized. Please reload the integration.

segment_manager_not_initialized.message: The RGB segment sequence manager is not initialized. Please reload the integration.

device_no_segment_support.message: Device {entity_id} does not support RGB segment sequences. Only T1M ceiling lights and T1 LED strips support this feature.

step_requires_colors.message: Step {step} requires at least one color. Please add color_1 for this step.

mqtt_client_not_initialized.message: The MQTT client is not initialized. Please check your MQTT configuration and reload the integration.

invalid_preset.message: Invalid preset: {preset}. Please select a valid preset from the list.

effect_required.message: Effect type is required when not using a preset. Please specify the effect type to use.

speed_required.message: Effect speed is required when not using a preset. Please specify the speed (1-100).

color_required.message: At least one color (color_1) is required when not using a preset. Please select at least one color.

invalid_effect_type.message: Invalid effect type: {effect}. This effect is not supported. Please choose from the available effects for your device.

preset_not_compatible.message: The preset {preset} is not compatible with device {device} (model: {model}). Please select a preset designed for this device type.

effect_not_supported.message: The effect {effect} is not supported by device {device}. {reason}

segment_addressing_not_supported.message: Device {device} does not support segment addressing. Only T1M ceiling lights and T1 LED strips support this feature.

segment_colors_required.message: Either a preset or segment_colors must be specified. Please select a preset or provide segment colors.

loop_count_required.message: Loop count is required when loop mode is "count". Please specify how many times to loop the sequence.

step_incomplete.message: Step {step} is incomplete. All fields (color temperature, brightness, transition time, and hold duration) must be provided for each step.

step_required.message: At least one step is required. Please configure Step 1 with all required fields.

invalid_sequence_configuration.message: Invalid sequence configuration: {error}. Please check your step values are within valid ranges.

publish_pattern_failed.message: Failed to publish segment pattern to {device}. Please check that the device is available and try again.

publish_gradient_failed.message: Failed to publish gradient to {device}. Please check that the device is available and try again.

publish_blocks_failed.message: Failed to publish block pattern to {device}. Please check that the device is available and try again.

start_sequence_failed.message: Failed to start CCT sequence for {entity}. Please check that the light is available and try again.

stop_sequence_failed.message: Failed to stop CCT sequence for {entity}. The sequence may have already completed.

device_not_found.message: Device {device} was not found in the Zigbee2MQTT registry. Please ensure the device is properly paired.

invalid_backup_structure.message: The backup file structure is invalid or corrupted. Please ensure you are using a valid preset backup file exported from this integration.

unsupported_backup_version.message: Backup version {version} is not supported by this version of the integration. Please export a new backup file or update the integration.

invalid_preset_type.message: Invalid preset type found in backup file. The file may be corrupted or incompatible.

missing_preset_fields.message: Missing required fields in preset: {fields}. The backup file may be corrupted or from an incompatible version.

invalid_color_format.message: Invalid color format in preset. Colors must be in XY format with x and y coordinates. The backup file may be from an older version.

invalid_preset_structure.message: The preset structure in the backup file is invalid. The file may be corrupted or from an incompatible version.

rgb_list_invalid_length.message: RGB list must have exactly 3 values, got {count}. Please provide a color in the format [r, g, b] with three values.

color_dict_invalid_format.message: Color dict must have either 'x'/'y' keys (XY format) or 'r'/'g'/'b' keys (RGB format). Please use a valid color format.

color_invalid_type.message: Invalid color format: expected dict or list, got {type}. Please provide colors as either a dictionary (XY or RGB) or a list [r, g, b].

unsupported_entities.message: The following entities are not supported Aqara devices: {entity_list}. Please select only Aqara T1, T1M, T1 Strip, or T2 bulb entities that are connected via Zigbee2MQTT.

entity_not_found_in_any_instance.message: Entity {entity_id} was not found in any configured Zigbee2MQTT instance. Configured instances: {instances}. Please ensure the device is paired with one of these instances.

user_preset_missing_field.message: User preset {preset} is missing required field: {field}. Please check the preset configuration.

user_preset_no_colors.message: User preset {preset} has no colors defined. Please add at least one color to the preset.

user_preset_no_segments.message: User preset {preset} has no segments defined. Please add segment configuration to the preset.

user_preset_no_steps.message: User preset {preset} has no steps defined. Please add at least one step to the sequence.

start_segment_sequence_failed.message: Failed to start segment sequence for {entity_id}: {error}. Please check that the device is available and try again.

set_dynamic_effect.name: Set dynamic effect
set_dynamic_effect.description: Activate a dynamic RGB effect on Aqara lights. Use presets from the Aqara app or create custom effects with up to 8 colors.

entity_id.name: Light entity
entity_id.description: The light entity or group to control.

preset.name: Preset effect
preset.description: Choose a preset effect from the Aqara mobile app.

effect.name: Effect type
effect.description: The dynamic effect pattern to activate.

color_1.name: Color 1
color_1.description: First effect color (required if not using a preset).

segments.name: Segments
segments.description: For T1 Strip only - segments to apply effect to.

turn_on.name: Turn on light
turn_on.description: Automatically turn on the light before applying the effect.

sync.name: Synchronized
sync.description: When targeting multiple lights, apply the effect to all lights simultaneously for synchronized group effects.

z2m_base_topic.name: Z2M base topic
z2m_base_topic.description: Custom Zigbee2MQTT base topic. If not specified, uses the topic configured during integration setup.

stop_effect.name: Stop effect
stop_effect.description: Stop the current RGB dynamic effect or segment pattern and restore the light to its previous state. If no previous state is saved, the effect is stopped without changing the light state.

entity_id.name: Light entity
entity_id.description: The light entity or group to control.

restore_state.name: Restore state
restore_state.description: Restore the light to its pre-effect state (brightness, color, temperature).

z2m_base_topic.name: Z2M base topic
z2m_base_topic.description: Custom Zigbee2MQTT base topic. If not specified, uses the topic configured during integration setup.

set_segment_pattern.name: Set segment pattern
set_segment_pattern.description: Set individual segment colors on T1M and T1 Strip lights. Use presets from the Aqara app or create custom patterns.

entity_id.name: Light entity
entity_id.description: The light entity or group to control.

preset.name: Preset pattern
preset.description: Choose a preset segment pattern from the Aqara mobile app.

segment_colors.name: Segment colors
segment_colors.description: List of segment/color pairs. Each entry specifies a segment and its RGB color.

turn_on.name: Turn on light
turn_on.description: Automatically turn on the light before applying the pattern.

turn_off_unspecified.name: Turn off unspecified segments
turn_off_unspecified.description: Turn off segments not specified in the pattern.

sync.name: Synchronized
sync.description: When targeting multiple lights, apply the pattern to all lights simultaneously for synchronized group effects.

z2m_base_topic.name: Z2M base topic
z2m_base_topic.description: Custom Zigbee2MQTT base topic. If not specified, uses the topic configured during integration setup.

create_gradient.name: Create gradient
create_gradient.description: Create a smooth color gradient across segments on T1M and T1 Strip lights. Use 2-6 colors for the gradient.

entity_id.name: Light entity
entity_id.description: The light entity or group to control.

segments.name: Segments
segments.description: Segments to apply gradient to. If not specified, applies to all segments.

turn_on.name: Turn on light
turn_on.description: Automatically turn on the light before applying the gradient.

sync.name: Synchronized
sync.description: When targeting multiple lights, apply the gradient to all lights simultaneously for synchronized group effects.

z2m_base_topic.name: Z2M base topic
z2m_base_topic.description: Custom Zigbee2MQTT base topic. If not specified, uses the topic configured during integration setup.

create_blocks.name: Create blocks
create_blocks.description: Create evenly spaced blocks of color across segments on T1M and T1 Strip lights. Use 1-6 colors for the blocks.

entity_id.name: Light entity
entity_id.description: The light entity or group to control.

segments.name: Segments
segments.description: Segments to apply blocks to. If not specified, applies to all segments.

turn_on.name: Turn on light
turn_on.description: Automatically turn on the light before applying blocks.

expand.name: Expand blocks
expand.description: Expand the blocks to fill segments evenly. If false, alternates colors.

sync.name: Synchronized
sync.description: When targeting multiple lights, apply the blocks to all lights simultaneously for synchronized group effects.

z2m_base_topic.name: Z2M base topic
z2m_base_topic.description: Custom Zigbee2MQTT base topic. If not specified, uses the topic configured during integration setup.

start_cct_sequence.name: Start CCT sequence
start_cct_sequence.description: Start a dynamic CCT (color temperature) sequence on Aqara lights. Use a preset sequence or define custom steps with color temperature, brightness, transition, and hold time.

entity_id.name: Light entity
entity_id.description: The light entity or group to control.

turn_on.name: Turn on light
turn_on.description: Automatically turn on the light before starting the sequence if it is off.

sync.name: Synchronized
sync.description: When targeting multiple lights, start the sequence on all lights simultaneously for synchronized group effects.

loop_count.name: Loop count
loop_count.description: Number of times to loop the sequence (required when loop mode is count).

end_behavior.name: End behavior
end_behavior.description: What to do when the sequence completes.

z2m_base_topic.name: Z2M base topic
z2m_base_topic.description: Custom Zigbee2MQTT base topic. If not specified, uses the topic configured during integration setup.

stop_cct_sequence.name: Stop CCT sequence
stop_cct_sequence.description: Stop a running CCT sequence on Aqara lights.

entity_id.name: Light entity
entity_id.description: The light entity or group to control.

z2m_base_topic.name: Z2M base topic
z2m_base_topic.description: Custom Zigbee2MQTT base topic. If not specified, uses the topic configured during integration setup.

pause_cct_sequence.name: Pause CCT sequence
pause_cct_sequence.description: Pause a running CCT sequence on Aqara lights. The sequence will stop at its current state until resumed.

entity_id.name: Light entity
entity_id.description: The light entity or group to control.

z2m_base_topic.name: Z2M base topic
z2m_base_topic.description: Custom Zigbee2MQTT base topic. If not specified, uses the topic configured during integration setup.

resume_cct_sequence.name: Resume CCT sequence
resume_cct_sequence.description: Resume a paused CCT sequence on Aqara lights. The sequence will continue from where it was paused.

entity_id.name: Light entity
entity_id.description: The light entity or group to control.

z2m_base_topic.name: Z2M base topic
z2m_base_topic.description: Custom Zigbee2MQTT base topic. If not specified, uses the topic configured during integration setup.

start_segment_sequence.name: Start RGB segment sequence
start_segment_sequence.description: Start a timed RGB segment sequence on T1M/T1 Strip lights. Create dynamic patterns with custom color activation over time. Use presets or build custom sequences.

entity_id.name: Light entity
entity_id.description: The light entity or group to control.

turn_on.name: Turn on light
turn_on.description: Turn on the light before starting the sequence if it is currently off.

sync.name: Synchronized start
sync.description: Start the sequence on all lights simultaneously (recommended for groups).

loop_count.name: Loop count
loop_count.description: Number of times to loop the sequence (required when loop mode is count).

end_behavior.name: End behavior
end_behavior.description: What to do when the sequence completes.

clear_segments.name: Clear segments
clear_segments.description: Clear all segments (set to black) before starting the sequence.

skip_first_in_loop.name: Skip first step in loop
skip_first_in_loop.description: Skip the first step when looping. Useful for setting an initial pattern that should not repeat.

z2m_base_topic.name: Z2M base topic
z2m_base_topic.description: Custom Zigbee2MQTT base topic. If not specified, uses the topic configured during integration setup.

stop_segment_sequence.name: Stop RGB segment sequence
stop_segment_sequence.description: Stop a running RGB segment sequence on T1M/T1 Strip lights.

entity_id.name: Light entity
entity_id.description: The light entity or group to control.

z2m_base_topic.name: Z2M base topic
z2m_base_topic.description: Custom Zigbee2MQTT base topic. If not specified, uses the topic configured during integration setup.

pause_segment_sequence.name: Pause RGB segment sequence
pause_segment_sequence.description: Pause a running RGB segment sequence on T1M/T1 Strip lights. The sequence will stop at its current state until resumed.

entity_id.name: Light entity
entity_id.description: The light entity or group to control.

z2m_base_topic.name: Z2M base topic
z2m_base_topic.description: Custom Zigbee2MQTT base topic. If not specified, uses the topic configured during integration setup.

resume_segment_sequence.name: Resume RGB segment sequence
resume_segment_sequence.description: Resume a paused RGB segment sequence on T1M/T1 Strip lights. The sequence will continue from where it was paused.

entity_id.name: Light entity
entity_id.description: The light entity or group to control.

z2m_base_topic.name: Z2M base topic
z2m_base_topic.description: Custom Zigbee2MQTT base topic. If not specified, uses the topic configured during integration setup.

start_dynamic_scene.name: Start dynamic scene
start_dynamic_scene.description: Start a dynamic scene on target lights with slow color transitions. Creates ambient lighting by cycling through colors with configurable timing and distribution across multiple lights.

entity_id.name: Light entity
entity_id.description: The light entity or group to control.

preset.name: Preset scene
preset.description: Choose a preset dynamic scene or your custom preset name.

color_1.name: Color 1
color_1.description: First scene color in XY format.

color_2.name: Color 2
color_2.description: Second scene color in XY format.

color_3.name: Color 3
color_3.description: Third scene color in XY format.

color_4.name: Color 4
color_4.description: Fourth scene color in XY format.

color_5.name: Color 5
color_5.description: Fifth scene color in XY format.

color_6.name: Color 6
color_6.description: Sixth scene color in XY format.

color_7.name: Color 7
color_7.description: Seventh scene color in XY format.

color_8.name: Color 8
color_8.description: Eighth scene color in XY format.

transition_time.name: Transition time
transition_time.description: Time in seconds for color transitions.

hold_time.name: Hold time
hold_time.description: Time in seconds to hold each color before transitioning.

distribution_mode.name: Distribution mode
distribution_mode.description: How colors are distributed across lights.

offset_delay.name: Offset delay
offset_delay.description: Delay in seconds between lights when applying colors. Creates a ripple effect.

random_order.name: Random order
random_order.description: Randomize the order of color cycling.

loop_count.name: Loop count
loop_count.description: Number of times to loop the scene.

end_behavior.name: End behavior
end_behavior.description: What to do when the scene completes.

stop_dynamic_scene.name: Stop dynamic scene
stop_dynamic_scene.description: Stop running dynamic scene(s) on the target lights.

entity_id.name: Light entity
entity_id.description: The light entity or group to control.

restore_state.name: Restore state
restore_state.description: Restore lights to their pre-scene state.

pause_dynamic_scene.name: Pause dynamic scene
pause_dynamic_scene.description: Pause running dynamic scene(s) on the target lights. Lights hold their current color until resumed.

entity_id.name: Light entity
entity_id.description: The light entity or group to control.

resume_dynamic_scene.name: Resume dynamic scene
resume_dynamic_scene.description: Resume paused dynamic scene(s) on the target lights. The scene continues from where it was paused.

entity_id.name: Light entity
entity_id.description: The light entity or group to control.
